text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: After praying at a shrine with Agnes Tachyon...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Phew...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I'm not about to complain about having come all
the way to this shrine...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Whatever you've prayed for, it seems important
enough that you'd seek the intervention of a
higher power.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: But if you're done now, I'd say we can go.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: No, just a little out of sorts.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Maybe the macrophages in me are slacking off
and leaving my apoptotic debris unattended to.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: That was a contextless joke, of course.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Besides, if my macrophages truly weren't doing
their job, it wouldn't be a question of just my
mood.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I guess it doesn't really matter anyway.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It appears something has really gotten her down.
I'd like to do something to make her feel better,
but...
choice_data_list: I'm going to go pray one more time!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Hm? Don't tell me you're planning to pray for me
to get better!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: You think doing so is going to change anything?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: But then again, you are the simple type.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: In any case, I can't remain in this daze forever...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: I think I'll conduct an experiment to lift my spirits.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She smiles playfully, indicating she might be back
to her usual self.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: I won't stop you if it'll make you happy.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: But, don't get your hopes up about me today.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
We probably aren't going to get any useful
information while I'm feeling like this, no matter
what we do...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Tachyon lets out a big sigh. It appears she
can't get back to her normal self.
